emails.subject: Fwd: Expedited Concurrent Care Appeals — Kovacs, James & Obata, Kenji | Desert Peaks Rehabilitation Center
emails.body_text:
---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jennifer Castillo, RN <j.castillo@desertpeaksrehab.com>
Date: April 14, 2026, 9:47 AM PDT
To: appeals@mojavecrest.com
Subject: Expedited Concurrent Care Appeals — Kovacs, James & Obata, Kenji | Desert Peaks Rehabilitation Center

To the Mojave Crest Assurance Appeals & Grievances Team:

Desert Peaks Rehabilitation Center is submitting expedited concurrent care appeals on behalf of two patients currently admitted to our facility. Both appeals are submitted under Authorized Representative Agreements on file with Mojave Crest.

APPEAL 1 — KOVACS, JAMES
Member ID:          44710006
DOB:                02/03/2008
Case Reference:     CR-2026-044721
Plan / Group:       MCA-4471 (PY2026)
Service:            Inpatient SUD Rehabilitation (H0019)
Denial Issued:      April 7, 2026
Denial Effective:   April 15, 2026
Enclosed:           Kovacs_James_ClinicalPacket_CR-2026-044721.pdf
                    MCA_Denial_Letter_Kovacs_James_CR-2026-044721.pdf

APPEAL 2 — OBATA, KENJI
Member ID:          09230007
DOB:                08/04/1985
Case Reference:     CR-2026-092317
Plan / Group:       MCA-0923 (PY2025-26)
Service:            Inpatient SUD Rehabilitation (H0019)
Admission Date:     April 2, 2026
Denial Effective:   April 9, 2026
Prior Auth:         PA-0923-2026-0287 (issued March 28, 2026)
Enclosed:           Obata_Kenji_ClinicalPacket_CR-2026-092317.pdf
                    MCA_Denial_Letter_Obata_Kenji_CR-2026-092317.pdf

Both patients are currently admitted. We request expedited concurrent care review consistent with applicable federal and Nevada concurrent care protections. Coverage must continue pending the outcome of these appeals.

Please confirm receipt and assign case numbers. We are available for peer-to-peer review upon request.

Sincerely,
Jennifer Castillo, RN, CCM
Utilization Review Coordinator
Desert Peaks Rehabilitation Center
Direct: (702) 555-4215  |  ur@desertpeaksrehab.com
4800 Desert Peaks Boulevard, Henderson, NV 89002
